name: chr4_long_arm_heterochromatin
description: Zebrafish segmental duplication / special region: chromosome 4 right-arm heterochromatin block, ~50 Mb of low-recombination, satellite- and NLR-rich DNA; the major zebrafish heterochromatin region. These regions are undercollapsed in GRCz11 and frequently produce ambiguous read placements; reads here should always be reported multi-position.
